texto: I'm very fond of the British cinema. I'm a big fan of Martin Campbell and Daniel Craig. I actually find Daniel very inspirational, especially on the physical side of things. He really inspired me to get back into shape when I started to add on a few pounds. I think he's a great role model.
explicacao: Citação de Steven Bauer sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I'm very fond of the British cinema. I'm a big fan of Martin Campbell and Daniel Craig. I actuall…” articula motivacao, great, me em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e me.

frase_original: I'm very fond of the British cinema. I'm a big fan of Martin Campbell and Daniel Craig. I actually find Daniel very inspirational, especially on the physical side of things. He really inspired me to get back into shape when I started to add on a few pounds. I think he's a great role model.
